seoTitle: South Kalgoorlie vs South Kumminin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Kalgoorlie and South Kumminin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Kalgoorlie vs South Kumminin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Kalgoorlie and South Kumminin.
heading: South Kalgoorlie vs South Kumminin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Kalgoorlie, Western Australia and South Kumminin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Kumminin has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to South Kalgoorlie (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Kalgoorlie or South Kumminin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Kalgoorlie has a flood risk score of 28/100, while South Kumminin scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Kalgoorlie scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. South Kumminin scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Kalgoorlie or South Kumminin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Kumminin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
